text: Recent telemetry on T-020 has shown anomalous behaviour. First identify the available sensor channels, run an anomaly check on the relevant channel(s), pull the RUL forecast over a 90-day horizon, and create a work order whose scope and priority reflect the combined anomaly and forecast evidence.
category: Anomaly Detection and RUL Forecast to Work Order
characteristic_form: The answer should report the available sensor channels for T-020, the anomaly findings on the channel(s) examined, the RUL forecast at the 90-day horizon, and create a work order whose priority and scope are explicitly justified by both the anomaly and the forecast (e.g. emergency vs short-term corrective).
